sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: How Talos Energy’s Q1 EPS and EBITDA Beat Amid Revenue Dip At Talos Energy (TALO) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Talos Energy reported a strong first-quarter result, surpassing analyst estimates for EPS and EBITDA despite a slight revenue dip. This performance, coupled with a renewed focus on capital discipline and long-term execution, reinforces its investment narrative as an offshore oil and gas producer prioritizing operational efficiency. The company's expanded equity buyback authorization also signals a commitment to returning excess cash and aligning with its 2026 efficiency plan.

feed.title: Tesla, Google among market cap stock movers on Thursday
feed.summary: Thursday's market saw significant stock movements, with Tesla and Google experiencing declines, while Medpace and United Rentals saw substantial gains. The article details the biggest stock movers across mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap categories, highlighting specific company performances and reasons behind the shifts.

feed.title: Edge's Arris Trim Uses Mineral Composite to Limit Joint Gaps
feed.summary: Edge, a brand of UFP Retail Solutions under UFP Industries (NASDAQ: UFPI), has launched Arris™, a new mineral-based composite exterior trim. This product is designed as a low-maintenance, durable, and dimensionally stable alternative to PVC trim, aiming to minimize thermal movement and maintain tight joints. Arris will be showcased at the Southeast Building Conference later this month, highlighting its innovative Surestone® technology and improved performance features.

feed.title: California American Water Says No Service Cuts Are Expected
feed.summary: California American Water is investing $2.5 million in its Northern District Well Rehabilitation Program, a multi-year initiative running through December 2027, to upgrade over 100 groundwater wells and maintain water system reliability. This program, which includes rehabilitation work on the Auberry Well in Sacramento, is designed to enhance groundwater production capacity and extend infrastructure life. The company confirmed that no service interruptions are expected for customers during these upgrade activities.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust earnings in focus after $3.5B acquisition By Investing.com
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust is set to report its second-quarter earnings, with analysts anticipating $0.47 per share on $1.66 billion in revenue. The report follows significant strategic moves, including a $3.5 billion acquisition of data centers from Blackstone and a substantial equity offering, aimed at reshaping the REIT's growth trajectory amid increasing AI-driven data center demand. Investors will be focused on management's ability to articulate a clear path to earnings accretion from these investments, the timeline for the Blackstone deal's impact, leasing momentum, and the company's power strategy to address energy infrastructure bottlenecks.

feed.title: Boeing narrowly tops Airbus in muted Farnborough Airshow order race (BA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Boeing Co. (BA) surpassed Airbus (EADSF)(EADSY) in aircraft orders at the Farnborough Airshow, though the event highlighted the industry's shift from large sales announcements to a focus on increasing production. Strong demand is maintaining massive order backlogs for both companies, which are now prioritizing overcoming supply chain issues, labor shortages, and engine production bottlenecks.

feed.title: Arkansas Sues Pfizer, J&J, Others Over Drug Discount Access
feed.summary: Arkansas is suing 13 pharmaceutical companies, including Pfizer, Johnson & Johnson, and Eli Lilly & Co., alleging they imposed unlawful restrictions on healthcare providers seeking drug discounts under the federal 340B Drug Pricing Program. Attorney General Tim Griffin claims these companies, along with their data management firm, violated the state's deceptive trade practices rules and a law preventing such discount restrictions. The lawsuit targets significant players in the pharmaceutical industry over access to crucial drug pricing benefits.

feed.title: HST Maintains by Wells Fargo -- Price Target Raised to $26.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Cooper Clark maintained the price target for Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) but raised it to $26.00, marking a 4% increase, while keeping an Overweight rating. Despite this positive analyst outlook, GuruFocus indicates HST is 23.1% overvalued at its current price of $24.44 compared to its GF Value™ of $19.86. The company has a strong GF Score™ of 81/100, driven by profitability and momentum, but insider activity shows $1.7 million in shares sold over the last three months with no purchases.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin, Quest Diagnostics, Thermo Fisher Scientific And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Thursd
feed.summary: Several large-cap stocks, including Lockheed Martin, Quest Diagnostics, and Thermo Fisher Scientific, are experiencing significant gains on Thursday after reporting better-than-expected quarterly financial results and, in many cases, raising their full-year guidance. Lockheed Martin reported strong earnings and sales, leading to an 11.4% jump in its shares. Other companies like NVE Corp, Novocure, Cleveland-Cliffs, Medpace Holdings, United Rentals, Oceaneering International, Kaiser Aluminum Corp, Roper Technologies, RTX Corp, Norfolk Southern Corp, and Honeywell International also saw substantial share price increases following positive financial reports.

feed.title: Tenet Healthcare faces earnings test amid hospital sector headwinds By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tenet Healthcare is preparing to report second-quarter earnings, with analysts projecting growth in earnings and revenue despite sector-wide headwinds, particularly in hospital utilization. While most analysts rate the stock a "Strong Buy," concerns persist about physician staffing, outpatient pricing trends, and the stability of hospital margins. Investors will closely watch whether Tenet's diversified model can sustain growth amidst these challenges.

feed.title: Dow Says Iran War Could Boost Guidance as Supply Chain Shielded
feed.summary: Dow Inc. anticipates that ongoing Middle East tensions could increase plastics and packaging prices, benefiting its profits without raising material costs due to abundant U.S. natural gas and ethane supplies. This scenario could lead to an upside in the company's third-quarter guidance, as stated by CEO Karen Carter. The company's supply chain is shielded, allowing it to capitalize on rising oil prices.

feed.title: Fastenal Company (FAST) Gains from Reshoring Trends and AI Infrastructure Buildout
feed.summary: Fastenal Company (FAST) is highlighted by Brasada Capital Management in its Q2 2026 investor letter as a high-quality business benefiting from reshoring trends and AI infrastructure buildout. Fastenal provides essential industrial and construction supplies and inventory management solutions, embedding itself within client operations to ensure seamless supply chains. The company is valued for its reliable service, pricing power, and decentralized business model, though it is not among the top AI stock picks for its hedge fund.

feed.title: Stellantis Names Former Volkswagen North America CEO Performance Chief
feed.summary: Stellantis has appointed Tianshu Xin as the head of its China and Asia-Pacific region and Pablo Di Si as Chief Performance Officer, effective August and August 3, 2026, respectively. These appointments are aimed at strengthening regional leadership and accelerating the execution of the Value Creation Program. Both executives bring extensive international automotive experience, with Xin leading Stellantis China and Leapmotor International, and Di Si previously serving as president and CEO of Volkswagen Group North America.

feed.title: Stellantis Appoints Industry Veterans to Strengthen Regional Leadership and Performance Execution
feed.summary: Stellantis has appointed Tianshu Xin to lead its China and Asia-Pacific region and Pablo Di Si as Chief Performance Officer, both effective August 3. These appointments aim to strengthen regional leadership, accelerate execution of the Value Creation Program, and leverage the extensive experience of both industry veterans in operational excellence and strategic development.

feed.title: Lamb Weston earnings up next: Can efficiency gains offset margin squeeze? By Investing.com
feed.summary: Lamb Weston Holdings Inc. is preparing to announce its fourth-quarter fiscal 2026 results, facing scrutiny over its ability to maintain profit margins amidst rising costs. Analysts anticipate a notable decline in earnings per share despite a slight increase in revenue, highlighting profitability challenges. Investors will focus on the effectiveness of operational efficiency initiatives and international expansion in offsetting cost pressures.

feed.title: Amazon.com Inc Stock (AMZN) Moved Down by 3.73% on Jul 23: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Amazon.com Inc (AMZN) shares dropped by 3.73% on July 23rd, primarily due to a broader tech sector sell-off, concerns over AI capital expenditures, and slowing cloud growth affecting AWS. Softening consumer spending and potential prolonged high interest rates are also pressuring Amazon's retail and logistics margins. Investors are cautiously rebalancing portfolios ahead of earnings, scrutinizing Amazon's significant investment in AI and its ability to monetize these efforts amid rising fulfillment costs and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc Class A Stock (GOOGL) Moved Down by 6.17% on Jul 23: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc Class A (GOOGL) stock fell by 6.17% on July 23, driven by investor concerns over high AI infrastructure spending impacting operating margins and free cash flow, and missed YouTube advertising revenue estimates. Ongoing antitrust litigation also poses significant regulatory risks, alongside broader market rotation out of mega-cap tech stocks due to persistent inflationary pressures. Technical analysis indicates a sell signal, with neutral RSI and oversold Williams %R, while media coverage remains very high.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc Class C Stock (GOOG) Moved Down by 6.34% on Jul 23: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc Class C (GOOG) shares fell 6.34% due to investor concerns over rising AI infrastructure costs impacting operating margins, increasing antitrust litigation risks, and competition in digital advertising. Macroeconomic factors like inflation and institutional selling further exacerbated the stock's decline. Despite high media attention and bullish market sentiment, ongoing regulatory uncertainty and the need for clearer AI monetization strategies are expected to keep pressure on the stock.

feed.title: Unum Group stock hits 52-week low at 21.26 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Unum Group's stock recorded a new 52-week low at $21.26, reflecting market challenges and a 4.07% decline over the past year. Despite its "Fair" financial health rating from InvestingPro and $13.3 billion in revenue with growth, investor confidence has been impacted. The company's upcoming earnings report on July 28 will be closely watched for potential recovery indicators.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd: Form 8.3 - Prologis Inc; Public dealing disclosure
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. has disclosed its public dealing activities related to Prologis, Inc. as per Rule 8.3 of the Takeover Code. The disclosure details Invesco's interests and short positions in Prologis securities, showing ownership of 1.15% of common shares. The report also lists various purchase and sale transactions of Prologis common shares undertaken by Invesco on July 22, 2026.

feed.title: State Street (STT) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: State Street reported strong Q2 2026 results with record revenue and asset levels, driven by operating leverage and growth across its core businesses. The company introduced new medium-term financial targets, aiming for a 35% pretax margin and mid-20s return on tangible common equity through a $1 billion transformation program focused on technology and AI by 2029. Management expressed confidence in achieving these goals through strategic investments in core franchises, alternatives, digital assets, and wealth services, alongside operational improvements.

feed.title: Deckers earnings on deck: Can HOKA sustain growth momentum?
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corporation will report fiscal first-quarter earnings, with focus on whether its HOKA and UGG brands can maintain growth amidst tariff uncertainties and direct-to-consumer sales trends. Analysts anticipate an EPS of 87 cents on revenue of $1.02 billion, representing a 5.8% year-over-year revenue growth. Investors will be closely watching HOKA's direct-to-consumer performance and UGG's summer sales, as well as management's full-year fiscal 2027 guidance.

feed.title: VanEck Semiconductor ETF Options Spot-On: On July 22nd, 191.64K Contracts Were Traded, With 2.27 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On July 22nd, the VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH) saw significant options trading activity with 191.64K contracts changing hands, contributing to a total open interest of 2.27 million contracts. This high level of trading and open interest suggests considerable investor attention and speculative activity surrounding the semiconductor sector.

feed.title: INTU Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Intuit, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ: INTU) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between August 22, 2025, and May 20, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that

feed.title: Geosteering Boosts Confidence in Achievement of Heat Production Objectives
feed.summary: SLB's geosteering technology, specifically the PeriScope Edge™ and proVISION Plus™ services, enabled an operator in the Paris Basin to successfully optimize geothermal well productivity in a mature Dogger Carbonate aquifer. By providing precise well placement and real-time reservoir permeability insights, these technologies allowed for maximized reservoir contact within thin, heterogeneous carbonate intervals. This approach eliminated the need for a pilot hole, reducing subsurface uncertainty, simplifying well design, and ultimately bolstering confidence in achieving heat production objectives.

feed.title: INTU Deadline Alert: SueWallSt Reminds Intuit Inc. (INTU) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on September 8, 2026
feed.summary: SueWallSt reminds investors of a securities class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. (INTU), alleging misrepresentations about the company's TurboTax growth and revenue outlook. The lawsuit covers investors who purchased INTU securities between August 22, 2025, and May 20, 2026, and highlights a 20.02% stock decline following news of a workforce reduction and lowered TurboTax revenue guidance. Investors have until September 8, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status in this case.

feed.title: Harley-Davidson, Snap-on Tools exceed Wall Street expectations
feed.summary: Harley-Davidson Inc. and Snap-On Tools both reported second-quarter earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations. Harley-Davidson reported earnings of 75 cents per share, beating analyst estimates of 62 cents per share, though its adjusted revenue missed forecasts. Snap-On Inc. posted earnings of $4.96 per share, slightly higher than the $4.90 analysts expected, and its revenue also narrowly topped forecasts.

feed.title: SueWallSt Reminds Shareholders of a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of September 14, 2026 in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Lawsuit - REGN
feed.summary: SueWallSt is alerting investors of Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) about a securities class action lawsuit filed against the company. The lawsuit alleges that Regeneron made misleading statements regarding its Phase III Fianlimab-Libtayo Study, leading to a significant stock price decline between August 1, 2025, and May 15, 2026. The lead plaintiff deadline for investors is September 14, 2026.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces a Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (REGN)
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN). The lawsuit is on behalf of investors who purchased shares between August 1, 2025, and May 15, 2026, alleging that the company made misleading statements that led to artificially inflated stock prices. Investors are encouraged to join the lawsuit by September 14, 2026.

feed.title: SueWallSt Reminds Insulet Corporation Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit With a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of August 31, 2026 - PODD
feed.summary: SueWallSt has reminded Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD) investors of a pending class action lawsuit with a lead plaintiff deadline of August 31, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Insulet made materially misleading statements regarding its manufacturing quality in SEC filings, while defective controls at its Acton, Massachusetts facility produced 7 million flawed Omnipod insulin delivery devices. Investors who suffered losses may qualify for recovery, with shares declining significantly after two corrective disclosures and Medical Device Corrections were initiated.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Given "Neutral" Rating at Piper Sandler
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reaffirmed its "Neutral" rating on Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a price target of $208.00, indicating a potential slight downside from its current share price. Despite beating Q1 earnings estimates, the company's revenue fell short of expectations, and the stock is trading near its 52-week high. Insider activity includes a director buying shares and the CFO selling shares, amidst a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $200.44.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of HCA Healthcare, Inc. - HCA
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential claims on behalf of investors of HCA Healthcare, Inc. (HCA) regarding possible securities fraud or unlawful business practices. This investigation follows HCA's announcement on July 14, 2026, of lowered full-year 2026 profit guidance due to an unfavorable shift in payer mix, which caused HCA's stock price to fall by 6.95%. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: MSFT DEADLINE: SueWallSt Reminds Microsoft Corporation Investors of Upcoming Securities Class Action Deadline
feed.summary: SueWallSt is reminding Microsoft Corporation investors of an upcoming securities class action deadline on August 11, 2026. This deadline is for investors who purchased MSFT securities between May 1, 2025, and January 28, 2026, and wish to seek appointment as lead plaintiff in a lawsuit alleging false and misleading statements about Microsoft's AI initiatives. Investors with significant losses during this period are encouraged to evaluate seeking this role, though all class members retain rights to any recovery.

feed.title: Autodesk initiated at Buy due to 'ample upside potential' for FY27 revenue: Guggenheim
feed.summary: Guggenheim initiated coverage of Autodesk (ADSK) with a Buy rating and a $245 price target, anticipating that the company will surpass its full-year fiscal 2027 revenue estimates and continue growth in subsequent years. The positive outlook is attributed to Autodesk's strong business moat, particularly in AI-related trends, and its robust "system of record" in the software-meets-physical-world domain. Despite a year-to-date share price decline, Guggenheim sees ample upside potential for the stock.

feed.title: Prudential Financial stock hits 52-week low at 21.75 USD
feed.summary: Prudential Financial (PRU) stock has dropped to a 52-week low of $21.75, marking a 4.2% decline over the past year and nearly 8% over the past six months. The financial services company, with a market cap of $41.28 billion and a P/E ratio of 11.95, is facing a challenging market environment. Investors are awaiting its upcoming earnings report in six days to assess the company's future trajectory.

feed.title: REGN Shareholder Alert: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Contact Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between August 1, 2025, and May 15, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Regeneron made misleading statements regarding the Phase I data for Fianlimab-Libtayo, creating unrealistic expectations for the Phase III study, which ultimately failed to meet its primary endpoint. Investors who suffered losses after the stock dropped by 13.95% following the announcement may be eligible to recover damages.

feed.title: Saudi Arabia's divisive EA buyout approved under EU merger rules
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved the acquisition of Electronic Arts by a consortium including Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF) for $55 billion. The approval, made under EU Merger Regulation rules, concludes that the deal will not raise competition concerns due to its limited impact on markets where the companies are active. This deal has been met with controversy, particularly regarding Saudi Arabia's human rights record and concerns about "culture washing."

feed.title: Duke Energy stock hits 52-week low at 22.87 USD
feed.summary: Duke Energy Corporation's stock has dropped to a 52-week low of $22.87, down from its high of $25.30, despite a substantial market capitalization of $99.8 billion. The company has experienced a 4.3% year-to-date decline and a 5% drop over the past six months, though it maintains strong fundamentals with 7.2% revenue growth and a low beta of 0.37. Investors are awaiting its upcoming earnings report on August 6th for further insights.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Celebrates the Power of Skills To Feed Brighter Futures
feed.summary: Yum! Brands is actively investing in youth development programs globally through its Food & Futures strategy, aligning with World Youth Skills Day. Initiatives like Pizza Hut's YEP in Sri Lanka, KFC's Hatch in the UK, KFC's Bucket Search in Thailand, and Habit Burger & Grill's ProStart program aim to provide vocational training, build confidence, and create pathways to employment for young people, including those with disabilities or who haven't completed high school. The company also supports higher education and financial literacy through programs like the Yum! Center for Global Franchise Excellence and the Taco Bell Foundation's Community Grants, emphasizing the importance of skills for brighter futures.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings Inc stock hits 52-week high at 293.92 USD
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings Inc. stock has reached a new 52-week high of $293.92, subsequently climbing to $296.17, reflecting strong investor confidence. The company shows an attractive P/E ratio of 24.83 and PEG ratio of 0.81, indicating potential for earnings growth. Recent developments, including a quarterly dividend, new FDA-approved colorectal cancer screening test, expanded DPYD Genotyping test, the MyLabcorp mobile app, and enhanced collaboration with Epic, underscore Labcorp's strategic advancements in healthcare.

feed.title: Alphabet Drops 6% on Soaring AI Capex Despite 82% Cloud Surge; Meta Platforms, Snap Follow
feed.summary: Alphabet's stock (GOOGL) dropped 6% after its Q2 2026 report due to a significant hike in AI capital expenditure guidance, overshadowing strong revenue and cloud growth. While analysts trimmed price targets, they largely maintained bullish ratings, noting robust Cloud performance alongside increased AI infrastructure spending. This trend also impacted peer stocks like Meta Platforms (META) and Snap (SNAP), reflecting broader market anxiety over rising AI capex.

feed.title: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. 2026 Q2 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:TCBI) 2026-07-23
feed.summary: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. (TCBI) has released its Q2 2026 earnings call presentation. The company reported an EPS of $1.88, beating estimates by $0.02, and revenue of $335.50M, surpassing expectations by $2.27M with a 9.12% year-over-year increase. The slide deck provides detailed financial results for the quarter.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - REGN
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) on behalf of investors who suffered losses. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud or unlawful business practices, stemming from stock price drops following two negative announcements related to the Phase III Fianlimab-Libtayo Study and Phase 3 Trial of Fianlimab. Investors have until September 14, 2026, to seek appointment as Lead Plaintiff.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Microsoft Corporation of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - MSFT
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT) for alleged securities fraud or unlawful business practices. The lawsuit advises investors who suffered losses to contact the firm, with an August 11, 2026, deadline to apply for Lead Plaintiff. The action stems from disappointing Q2 2026 results, including slowed Azure growth, increased capital expenditures, and significantly lower-than-expected Microsoft 365 Copilot seat numbers, leading to a stock price drop and subsequent reports of Copilot functionality issues and reorganization.

feed.title: Pomerantz Law Firm Announces the Filing of a Class Action Against Intuit Inc. and Certain Officers - INTU
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. and certain officers, alleging misstatements about the company's competitive advantages, growth, and the overall strength of its business model. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of investors who purchased Intuit securities between August 22, 2025, and May 20, 2026, claims that Intuit was losing significant business in its tax-related segment, particularly TurboTax, due to competitive and pricing pressures, making its FY 2026 revenue growth guidance unreliable. The truth emerged on May 20, 2026, with news of job cuts and subsequently, revised lower guidance for TurboTax revenue growth, leading to a significant drop in Intuit's stock price.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of Alphabet Inc. - GOOG
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating potential claims against Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) following a Bloomberg report that Google is significantly behind schedule on its Gemini 3.5 Pro AI model. This delay, attributed to disappointing results from recent training data updates, led to a 4.4% drop in Alphabet's stock price on July 16, 2026. The law firm is inviting investors to contact them regarding potential securities fraud or unlawful business practices.

feed.title: Did You Lose Money Investing in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc.? Robbins LLP Urges Investors with Significant Losses to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights Against REGN
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is urging investors who lost money in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN) between August 1, 2025, and May 15, 2026, to contact the firm regarding a class-action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Regeneron misled investors about the viability of its Phase III Fianlimab-Libtayo study, which ultimately failed to meet its primary endpoint, causing significant stock price drops. Shareholders have until September 14, 2026, to submit papers to the court to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: McCormick Chooses London for Secondary Listing Following $44.8B Unilever Food Deal
feed.summary: McCormick & Co. will establish a secondary stock listing in London after its $44.8 billion acquisition of Unilever Plc’s food business, creating a major global seasonings, sauces, and condiments company. While London will host the secondary listing, the combined company's international headquarters will be in the Netherlands. This decision highlights London's continued strength for large consumer goods companies, despite disappointment from Dutch business groups and some Unilever shareholders questioning the deal's structure.

feed.title: Hagens Berman Investigating Potential Claims on Behalf of Investors in Pentair plc
feed.summary: Hagens Berman is investigating potential securities law violations by Pentair plc (PNR) after the company announced a significant earnings warning, a sharp reduction in full-year guidance, and the unexpected resignation of its CFO. The firm is looking into whether undisclosed and unsustainable sales practices with distributors may have artificially inflated revenue in past periods. Pentair investors who experienced substantial losses are encouraged to contact Hagens Berman.

feed.title: Citigroup Slashes Coinbase Price Target by 41% — What It Means for COIN Investors
feed.summary: Citigroup has significantly reduced its price target for Coinbase Global Inc. (COIN) by 41%, lowering it from $400 to $235 per share, citing concerns over regulatory challenges, declining trading volumes, and a challenging macroeconomic environment. This downgrade reflects a more cautious outlook from Wall Street, especially given the ongoing SEC lawsuit against Coinbase and the tapering optimism post-spot Bitcoin ETF approvals. Investors are advised to monitor the regulatory landscape and the outcome of legal battles as key drivers for COIN's future performance.
